title: Activation-adapter hook-payload IO schema (RFC-009 R3/R4, P2-S2)
description: The JSON an activation hook emits on stdout. additionalProperties:false at every level is the advisory invariant: a payload carrying `decision`/`block`/`permissionDecision` at the top level, or any key besides `hookSpecificOutput`, FAILS validation (plan REQ-20). `hookSpecificOutput` is the only permitted top-level key.
